headline: Jim Cramer explains why the stock market shrugged off fears over the Iran war and bad headlines
summary: The Middle East no longer carries the same economic weight it once did, CNBC Jim Cramer said on "Mad Money" on Monday.

headline: RBC Capital Initiates Coverage on KKR & Co. Inc. (KKR) with an Outperform Call
summary: KKR & Co. Inc. (NYSE:KKR) is one of the 14 Most Undervalued NYSE Stocks to Buy According to Analysts. RBC Capital initiated coverage of KKR on February 24, assigning the company an Outperform rating and a target price of $137. headline: Barclays Maintains Overweight on KKR, Lowers Price Target to $127
summary: Barclays  analyst Benjamin Budish   maintains KKR (NYSE:KKR) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $136 to $127.

headline: Jim Cramer's top 10 things to watch in the stock market Monday
